title: Day 11 Quiz — Event Loop and Infinite Scroll
description: Verify event loop ordering, Intersection Observer, pagination append, and observer cleanup.

questions.prompt: Microtasks run before macrotasks after synchronous code completes.
questions.explanation: The event loop drains the microtask queue completely before running the next macrotask.

options.text: When an element intersects with a root viewport or element

questions.explanation: Intersection Observer asynchronously reports when target elements cross visibility thresholds.

questions.prompt: Infinite scroll should update items with:

options.text: setPage only — items derive from page

questions.explanation: Append preserves previously loaded items. Direct push mutates state.

questions.prompt: Which are microtasks? Select all that apply.
questions.explanation: Promise reactions and queueMicrotask are microtasks. setTimeout and setInterval are macrotasks.

questions.prompt: Disconnect IntersectionObserver in useEffect {{blank1}} by calling observer.{{blank2}}().
questions.explanation: Cleanup prevents memory leaks and stale callbacks after unmount.
Sync A, B first. Microtask C before macrotask D.

questions.prompt: Why guard loadNextPage with isLoading && hasMore?

options.text: Prevent duplicate fetches when observer fires multiple times

questions.explanation: Without guards, sentinel visibility can trigger overlapping page fetches.

questions.prompt: Why is Intersection Observer preferred over scroll event listeners for infinite scroll?
questions.sampleAnswer: Scroll listeners fire on every pixel scrolled — expensive for long lists. Intersection Observer is browser-optimized, runs asynchronously, and only fires when visibility crosses a threshold.
questions.explanation: Production feeds use observer or virtualization — not raw scroll handlers.

questions.prompt: Complete the typed observer callback parameter.
questions.explanation: DOM lib provides IntersectionObserverEntry for typed callback entries.

options.text: hasMore is false or API returns empty next page

questions.explanation: Track hasMore from API metadata. Show end message when no additional pages exist.
